name: [GRIDHAND] CRM Sync Agent - Deal stage change → update all connected systems

gridhand.scenario: Deal stage change → update all connected systems
gridhand.description: When a deal stage is updated in the customer relationship management system, such as when a potential client moves from "lead" to "customer" in HubSpot, the workflow is triggered to update all connected systems, including the accounting software QuickBooks and the email marketing platform Mailchimp, to reflect the change, ensuring that the business owner's financial records and marketing campaigns are always up-to-date and synchronized. This automated process saves the business owner time and reduces errors, allowing them to focus on high-value activities like closing deals and serving customers. By integrating these systems, the business owner can also gain a more complete view of their sales funnel and customer interactions, enabling data-driven decisions to drive growth and revenue.
